productDisplayName: Paris Hilton Just Me Men Perfume
description: paris hilton's Just Me for men is a youth-oriented, long-lasting fragrance in a cylindrical two-tone bottle. It opens with a burst of citrus, black currant and grass with a cool aquatic heart. The dry down melts to patchouli, Amazon moss and musk.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
